nameMeanings.name: Moton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an altered form of English   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Moton was born in 1410, in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Moton, was 35 and his mother, Cicely Knyveton, was 25. He had at least 1 daughter with Cicely Knyveton. He died on 29 September 1457, in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Moton est né en 1410, à Peckleton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Moton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Cicely Knyveton, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Cicely Knyveton. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1457, à Peckleton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Moton 1410 in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Moton 35 und seine Mutter Cicely Knyveton 25. Er hatte mit Cicely Knyveton mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. September 1457 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England.
